title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.090 - Proceedings of, how kept
text:
77.090.  Proceedings of, how kept. — The council shall cause to be kept a journal of its proceedings, and the ayes and nays of the members shall be entered on any question at the desire of any two members.  The council may prescribe and enforce such rules as may be necessary to secure the attendance of its members and the expeditious transactions of its business.
(RSMo 1939 § 6886) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6740; 1919 § 8227; 1909 § 9164
